channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: US to let DR Congo football team in for World Cup despite Ebola restrictions
item.description: The US has banned non-Americans who have visited DR Congo, Uganda or South Sudan in the last 21 days from entry.

item.title: US authorities say missionary who contracted Ebola en route to Germany
item.description: World Health Organization says death toll from outbreak has risen to 134, as experts warn of continued challenges.

item.title: Thousands of protesters demand president’s resignation in Bolivia’s La Paz
item.description: Bolivia faces its worst economic crisis in 40 years, fueling nationwide protests demanding the president's resignation.

item.title: NAACP urges athletes to boycott southern US universities over voting rights
item.description: Organisation calls for Black athlete fan boycott over Supreme Court's Voting Rights Act ruling, southern redistricting.

item.title: Video shows oil spill on Iranian island after refinery attack last month
item.description: The impact of an oil spill caused by an attack on Iran’s Lavan refinery last month has been revealed.

item.title: Arsenal’s Arteta claims Premier League to step from Guardiola’s shadow
item.description: Mikel Arteta was Pep Guardiola's assistant at Man City, but has pipped his former tutor to the Premier League title.

item.title: Trump showcases new ‘drone-protected’ White House ballroom
item.description: US President Donald Trump has given reporters a tour around the construction site of his White House ballroom.

item.title: Arsenal crowned Premier League champions as Man City draw at Bournemouth
item.description: Arsenal's 22-year wait for a Premier League title ends as Manchester City draw 1-1 at Bournemouth.

item.title: More than 15,800 people killed in Russia’s all-out war on Ukraine: UN
item.description: Nearly 800 children are among those killed in Ukraine since Russia's full-scale invasion in February 2022, the UN says.

item.title: Norway journalist calls out Modi over avoiding media questions
item.description: A Norwegian reporter asked Narendra Modi why he wouldn’t speak to the media after a press conference in Oslo on Monday.

item.title: Does Ukraine have the advantage at the moment?
item.description: Kyiv takes the war deeper into Russia with a huge attack on the Moscow region.

item.title: Southampton expelled from world’s most lucrative football match for spying
item.description: Southampton out of EFL championship playoff final after spying on Middlesbrough, who face Hull for Premier League place.

item.title: Mansour Kaziha, Nader Awad identified as victims in San Diego Mosque attack
item.description: All three victims have now been identified in California attack being investigated as hate crime.

item.title: Moment Neymar brought to tears after surprise World Cup call-up
item.description: Brazil’s all-time top scorer Neymar jr was brought to tears after hearing his name included in Brazil’s World Cup squad.

item.title: Israeli forces fire ‘rubber bullets’ at activists on Gaza aid flotilla
item.description: Israeli naval forces are accused of firing ‘rubber bullets’ at activists on board the Gaza-bound Global Sumud Flotilla.

item.title: High prices in Iran’s stunted housing market leave tenants with few options
item.description: Tenants face bleak prospects as economic uncertainty persists amid a potential resumption of fighting.

item.title: Trump’s Board of Peace urges fix to ‘gap’ in funding
item.description: UN-approved body says that pledged funds have not materialised despite urgent situation in Gaza.

item.title: DRC prepares Ebola treatment centres as death toll rises
item.description: Health workers in the Democratic Republic of the Congo are restoring Ebola treatment centres.

item.title: Trump backs Ken Paxton in crucial Texas Republican Senate run-off
item.description: Polls show mixed results, with Paxton and Cornyn in close battle against Democrat James Talarico.

item.title: Somaliland to open embassy in Jerusalem, Israel in Hargeisa: Envoy
item.description: The move comes months after Israel officially recognised the independence of Somalia's breakaway region.

item.title: Putin arrives in China for talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin has arrived in Beijing for talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

item.title: US imposes sanctions on Gaza flotilla organisers amid Israeli crackdown
item.description: Rights advocates say Trump administration is using sanctions and 'terrorism label' to silence Palestinian activism.

item.title: Israel’s far-right Finance Minister Smotrich says ICC seeking his arrest
item.description: After an ICC warrant request, Israel's Smotrich threatened to displace Palestinians from the West Bank.

item.title: Tributes pour in for ‘hero’ guard killed in San Diego mosque shooting
item.description: Amin Abdullah, the security guard killed while trying to stop gunmen entering the Islamic Centre of San Diego.

item.title: Trump says Xi assured him China would not send weapons to Iran
item.description: US president also says he could again strike Iran if progress on ceasefire is not made within 'days'.
